data.headline: Portfolio Underperforms SPY; Modest Gains on Flat Activity
data.summary: Portfolio returned 0.1631% (+$1,631.34) against starting capital of $1,000,000, underperforming the SPY benchmark by 139 basis points (benchmark returned 0.30%). The portfolio is currently in cash with zero holdings. Six trades were executed across eight decision points. Process metrics show full groundedness (100%) with zero refusals or risk rejections. Total process cost was $0.094721 across 63,245 tokens and 5 citation checks.
data.risk_note: Negative alpha of -0.001369 indicates underperformance relative to benchmark. All-cash position exposes portfolio to opportunity cost in positive market environment.
